currentFocus: RE/Ghidra posture remains source-only during the pre-Sol-Ultra quality wave. The current edits preserve static-accounting truth and fail-closed local Ghidra snapshot behavior without running live Ghidra, reading private assets, mutating projects, launching BEA, or generating payloads.

staticClosure.wave1220StaticCloseout: Wave1220 static closeout acceptance: active current-risk focused accounting is `1179/1179 = 100.00%`; remaining active focused work: 0

currentTruth.ghidraQueueProbe: tools/ghidra_static_reaudit_queue_probe.py --check is read-only and no longer writes queue artifacts. It fails closed when a local quality snapshot is absent; report writing requires --write-report.
currentTruth.wave1220Probe: tools/static_reaudit_final_closeout_wave1220.py accepts the tracked static closeout when canonical docs and state batons contain the closeout token and the local optional queue snapshot is either valid or absent with progress provenance present.
currentTruth.scope: Current RE-facing source changes are validator and state hygiene only.

nonClaims: No live Ghidra mutation, decompiler read-back, project backup mutation, or private binary/asset read.
No BEA launch, CDB attach, audio capture, visual/runtime proof, generated asset output, runtime texture decode proof, runtime parser proof, or rebuild parity proof.
No command arming, extractor/importer execution, AppCore/WinUI/CLI/Godot product exposure, release action, Host/Join enablement, or online/player-ready claim.
hardPayloadBoundary: Full Ghidra databases/backups, copied executable bytes, extracted assets, raw captures, raw proof bundles, screenshots/frame dumps, secrets, local proof roots, and local campaign paths remain outside tracked state.

runtimeProofBoundary.onlineMultiplayer: not player-ready; Host/Join remains disabled until required distinct-endpoint command-source proof and source-bound copied-runtime causality proof are accepted

Run public-boundary and hard-payload gates before commit/push.

blockers: No local Ghidra quality snapshot is available for a positive queue probe result in this lane.
